reasoning: The market price on October 30, 2025, was extremely low (6%). The US has consistently avoided deploying regular ground troops (non-SOF) to Yemen, relying exclusively on airstrikes, naval presence, and Special Operations Forces to counter Houthi threats. With only a few weeks remaining until the end of 2025 (amounting to ~52 days from the November 9 cutoff), the window for such a major policy shift or deployment is minimal. In the absence of an immediate precipitating crisis in early November that would justify regular boots on the ground, the probability has likely decayed slightly below the October 30 market price.
